'''''Ill Wind''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] assigned at the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] under the command of Warlord [[Zsinj]]. It later participated in the [[Battle of Kuat (Hunt for Zsinj)|Battle of Kuat]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
